name: woocommerce-quicker
title: WooCommerce Quicker
description: Browse and search WooCommerce orders, customers, and products across multiple stores from Raycast
author: g-mai

commands.name: woocommerce-orders
commands.title: Search Orders
commands.subtitle: WooCommerce
commands.description: List and search recent WooCommerce orders

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
